controls.name: Ensure no root account access key exists
controls.description: The root account should not have access keys
controls.remediation: Delete root account access keys via AWS Console
controls.remediation_code: # Manual: AWS Console > IAM > Security Credentials

controls.name: Ensure MFA is enabled for root account
controls.description: Root account must have MFA enabled
controls.remediation_code: # Manual: AWS Console > IAM > Security Credentials > MFA

controls.name: Ensure multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enabled for all IAM users
controls.description: All IAM users with console access should have MFA

controls.name: Ensure credentials unused for 90 days or greater are disabled
controls.description: IAM credentials not used in 90 days should be deactivated

controls.name: Ensure S3 Bucket Policy is set to deny HTTP requests
controls.remediation: Add bucket policy to deny non-SSL requests

controls.name: Ensure that S3 Buckets are configured with 'Block public access'
controls.description: S3 buckets should block public access
controls.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access for bucket: {bucket}
controls.remediation_code:
resource "aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block" "{bucket}_block" {
  bucket = "{bucket}"
  block_public_acls = true
  block_public_policy = true
  ignore_public_acls = true
  restrict_public_buckets = true
}

controls.name: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
controls.description: CloudTrail multi-region trail should be enabled

controls.name: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to port 22
controls.description: SSH should not be open to the internet
controls.remediation: Remove 0.0.0.0/0 from security group {sg_id} on port 22
controls.remediation_code: # Remove with: aws ec2 revoke-security-group-ingress --group-id {sg_id} --protocol tcp --port 22 --cidr 0.0.0.0/0

controls.name: Logical Access Controls - MFA Required
controls.description: All users must have MFA enabled (SOC2 requirement)

controls.name: System Monitoring - CloudTrail Enabled
controls.description: Audit logging must be enabled (SOC2 requirement)
